meta_title: For Freelancers: user onboarding to Solve slow development speed (Intermediate Checklist)
meta_description: Learn how to user onboarding and overcome slow development speed. A Intermediate-level Checklist using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Freelancers: User Onboarding to Solve Slow Dev Speed
content.seo_description: Stop wasting hours on manual setup. Learn how to automate user onboarding using Antigravity and Claude Code to deliver client projects at lightning speed.
content.answer_block: Slow development stems from repetitive manual setup and fragmented onboarding flows. By implementing automated, modular onboarding sequences via Antigravity and Claude Code, you condense weeks of configuration into minutes. This approach ensures immediate client value, reduces churn, and scales your freelance agency output without adding technical debt.
content.intro:
You’re staring at a blank screen, the clock is ticking, and your client expects a fully functional, polished SaaS dashboard by Monday. Every hour spent manually wiring up user authentication, database schemas, and welcome flows is an hour of profit bleeding out. This isn't just slow development; it's a bottleneck that prevents you from scaling your freelance business.

But what if you could treat onboarding as a repeatable, automated product rather than a chore? By leveraging the precision of Claude Code and the modular power of Antigravity, you can transform your workflow from reactive coding to proactive assembly. It’s time to stop building from scratch and start orchestrating high-velocity deployments.

steps.title: Define the Onboarding Schema
steps.description: Establish a unified data structure for user state to ensure consistency across the onboarding flow.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a standardized TypeScript interface for a multi-step user onboarding state, including progress tracking and completion flags.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --task 'Generate onboarding state interface based on provided schema'

steps.title: Automate Route Guarding
steps.description: Implement logic that redirects users based on their onboarding completion status, ensuring a seamless UX.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a middleware component that checks user onboarding status and enforces redirection to the appropriate step.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --task 'Implement route guard middleware for onboarding flow'

steps.title: Modular Step Components
steps.description: Build reusable UI components for onboarding steps that maintain state without prop-drilling.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a reusable React component wrapper for onboarding steps with built-in validation and progress event triggers.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --task 'Generate modular onboarding step components'

steps.title: API Handlers for Progression
steps.description: Develop high-performance endpoints to save user progress and trigger automated emails or external webhooks.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a serverless function to update user onboarding progress in the database and trigger a post-step webhook.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --task 'Create onboarding progress API handler'

steps.title: End-to-End Validation
steps.description: Verify the flow integrity to prevent dead ends and ensure data persistence.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a test suite to verify the full onboarding user journey, including edge cases for abandoned flows.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --task 'Generate E2E test suite for onboarding flow'

pro_tips: Always wrap your onboarding steps in a dedicated state machine to prevent users from skipping critical setup logic.
Use feature flags to toggle onboarding steps for different user tiers without rewriting the core codebase.
Implement 'optimistic UI updates' during onboarding so the client feels an immediate, snappy response even before the API confirms the write.
Cache the onboarding state in local storage as a fallback to ensure users don't lose progress on page refreshes.
Integrate telemetry tracking at every step to identify exactly where users drop off, allowing you to optimize your conversion rate.
resources: State Machine Patterns for React: https://xstate.js.org/docs
content.next_steps: Once your onboarding flow is live, run a session recording audit to observe real-user behavior and iterate on the friction points identified.
content.conversion_block: Stop letting slow dev cycles dictate your freelance income. Master these tools, reclaim your time, and start delivering professional-grade SaaS products that leave your clients speechless. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
